pageContext.name: Darth Vader Silver Miniature
pageContext.description: See Darth Vader™ as a sensational silver miniature designed by 3D master sculptor Alejandro Pereira Ezcurra. Fans will recognize this menacing stance, showing the Sith Lord™ using the Force™ choke!  Guaranteed minimum 150g pure silver, this is a very limited-edition piece - only 1,000 casts will be made.  This powerful figurine stands approx. 9cm tall and will arrive inside a substantial Star Wars™ themed case.   Feel the power of the Force and order now!
